query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayStartingPitcher, homeStartingPitcher, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML FROM games WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-30' AND id >= 2250060 ORDER BY id;
